overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rainy neon-lit futuristic city. The player descends from an elevated walkway, passes under a massive concrete overpass, and continues along a waterfront promenade with the illuminated skyline visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with neon signage

events.description: begins descending concrete stairs from elevated walkway
reaches bottom of stairs entering street level area

agents.ego_description: walking down wet concrete stairs from an elevated neon-lit walkway toward street level

entered.detail: large pink neon advertisement on building facade
wet elevated sidewalk with puddle reflections
green metal safety railing along walkway edge
descending stairs leading to street level
concrete structure providing shelter from rain

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an elevated concrete walkway sheltered from the rain, surrounded by vibrant pink and green neon signs. The player descends a flight of wet concrete stairs, passing green metal railings, transitioning from the covered walkway down to the street level below.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street under elevated highway

events.description: black sedan drives past on the right side of the road
entering darker shadow area beneath the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet asphalt street approaching an underpass, navigating around scattered debris

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past with headlights reflecting on wet pavement

entered.detail: wet multi-lane road with rain reflections
massive elevated highway structure overhead
safety barrier with alternating yellow and black stripes
tall pole with bright overhead lamp

segments.scene_description: Now at street level, the player walks along a wet asphalt road beneath a massive concrete overpass. A black sedan passes by on the right as the environment transitions from neon-lit storefronts to the darker, industrial area under the highway. Yellow and black safety barriers line the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered roadway under massive concrete overpass

events.description: large concrete pillar temporarily blocks the view of the road ahead
approaching exit of underpass with bright neon light visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit underpass with graffiti-covered concrete walls on both sides

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on approaching from the underpass exit

entered.detail: massive support column for the overpass above
concrete wall covered in colorful street art and tags
fluorescent lights mounted on the overpass ceiling

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a narrow, enclosed underpass beneath the highway. The space is dimly lit by overhead fluorescent lights, with graffiti covering the concrete walls. The atmosphere is industrial and shadowy, with occasional cars passing through the tunnel-like space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city street with neon billboards and futuristic skyline

events.description: exits underpass into open street with bright neon signage and visible skyline
yellow van passes by closely on the right side

agents.ego_description: emerging from the dark underpass into a vibrant neon-lit street with towering futuristic skyscrapers ahead

notable_agents.action: yellow van driving past on the right side of the road

entered.detail: tall vertical digital advertisement screen with purple and pink colors
tall glass and steel building with illuminated windows rising in the distance
decorative tree with red foliage lining the street
large illuminated advertising screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the scene opens up to reveal a wide city street lined with towering neon billboards and futuristic skyscrapers in the distance. A yellow van passes by on the right as the player walks past stylized red-leafed trees. The atmosphere shifts from industrial darkness to vibrant cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with city skyline view

events.description: moves from street to waterfront walkway with metal railing overlooking the city
passing by seated figures resting near the waterfront railing

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade with the illuminated city skyline visible across the water to the right

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a bench or crate near the waterfront railing

entered.detail: metal safety railing along the edge of the waterfront promenade
illuminated skyline of tall buildings visible across the water
tiled pedestrian walkway with scattered debris
piles of garbage and discarded items along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to a waterfront promenade with a metal railing overlooking the distant city skyline. The player walks along paved tiles past stylized red trees now on the left, with trash piles and a seated figure visible near the railing. The view opens up to show the expansive cityscape across the water, ending the journey in a quieter, more contemplative urban space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that descends from a neon-lit elevated walkway through a dark industrial underpass and finally opens onto a wide waterfront promenade. It begins on a sheltered concrete walkway surrounded by pink and green neon signs, moving down a flight of wet stairs to reach the street level. As the camera proceeds, the vibrant storefronts give way to the oppressive shadow of a massive concrete overpass and a narrow, graffiti-covered underpass lit by dim fluorescent lights. The scene then expands as the player exits the tunnel, shifting from industrial darkness back into a brilliant cyberpunk cityscape filled with towering billboards and red-leafed trees. Finally, the path leads to a paved waterfront promenade where the view opens up to a distant, illuminated skyline across the water.
